  float: right;
  width: 40%;
	text-align:right;
}

.qodef-blog .qodef-blog-item .qodef-e-left {
  margin: 0px 0px 20px 20px;
  float: left;
  width: 50%;
}

.qodef-e-info .qodef-e-info-cat>a{
  color:#000;
}

.qodef-blog .qodef-blog-item.format-link .qodef-e-link-text {
	color:#ffffff !important
}

.qodef-social-share li a{
	color:#000 !important;
}

.qodef-e-info .qodef-e-info-tag>a{
  border-radius: 7px;
  border: 1px solid #818181;
	color: #000;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.3em;
	background:none;
}

.qodef-m-filter{
	background-color:#fff;
}

.qodef-m-filter-item-name{
	font-family: 'Plaak', 'Maison Book';
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.4375em;
  font-weight: 400;
	color:#000000;
}

.qodef-m-filter .qodef-m-filter-item{
  color:#000000;
	margin-bottom:10px
}

.qodef-m-filter .qodef-m-filter-items{
  display: block;
  position: absolute;
  background-color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  left: -100%;
  right: -100%;
  z-index:999;
}

.qodef-grid.qodef-layout--masonry .qodef-grid-inner.qodef--masonry-init{
	margin-top:45px;
}

.editor-styles-wrapper .block-editor-block-list__block:not(.wp-block-post-title) {

  border: solid 1px #b6b6b6;
	padding: 20px 20px;
}

.qodef-blog .qodef-blog-item .qodef-e-title  {
  font-size: 26px !important;

	.subhead {
    font-size: 20px !important;
    line-height: 24px !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
}
}

.qodef-blog blockquote p, .qodef-blog h1, .qodef-blog h2, .qodef-blog h3, .qodef-blog h4, .qodef-blog h5, .qodef-blog h6{
	color:#000000 !important;
}

.subhead{
	font-size: 28px;
  line-height: 36px;
	max-width:75%;
}

.qodef-blog p{
	color:#888888 !important;
}

.qodef-blog blockquote p{
	font-family: 'Maison Book';
}

.wp-block-quote:before, blockquote:before {
	background-image: url(https://clmbr.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/quotes.png);

  width: 115px;
  height: 80px;
}

.widget .tagcloud a, .widget .wp-block-tag-cloud a {
  border-radius: 7px;
  color: #fff !important;
  border: 1px solid #818181;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  line-height: 1.3em !important;
  background: none;
  background-image: none;

.widget ul:not(.qodef-shortcode-list):not(.select2-selection__rendered) li a {

.qodef-blog.qodef-m.qodef--single p a{
	color:#000000 !important;
	font-family:'Maison Book';
	text-decoration: underline;

.full-width-youtube-video {

  padding-bottom: 56.25%;
  height: 0;
}

.full-width-youtube-video iframe {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;

								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {

					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );

				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
